title: Oscar Night
editorialSummary: Best Picture winners sorted by decade; false trails: Amadeus (1984) sounds 18th-century, Platoon (1986) and Forrest Gump (1994) are often confused as 1990s films, and No Country for Old Men (2007) sits in a decade alongside The Departed (2006) that most solvers associate with a different era.

meta.gptRationale: Best Picture winners are famous and the decade buckets are clean, so this is relatively approachable for a hard-tier cultural set.

groups.label: Best Picture Winners: 1970s
items: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
